ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: Timebank Global uses the camera only when you choose to take a photo or scan a QR code.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Choose a photo from your library for your profile or a post.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Record a voice message when you choose to send one.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Timebank Global uses your location only when you choose to search nearby marketplace listings.
